title: PackageVersionGenerator
description: Sets the version for a package.json file, either as a specific semantic version or a release type.

path.description: Path to the package.json file, relative to the workspace root.

vers.description: The new package.json version, either as a specific semantic version or a release type.  The release type can be one of 'major', 'minor', 'patch', 'premajor', 'preminor', 'prepatch', 'prerelease'.  If a release type is specified, the version will be bumped in accordance with the specified type.
